task_completion.description: Read the target list from xray_targets.txt
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the contents of xray_targets.txt, which should list the three X-ray binaries (Cygnus X-1, Scorpius X-1, V404 Cygni).

task_completion.description: Capture B and V band optical baseline images for the targets
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars/Ekos capture module showing a sequence queue configured for B and V filters, with 5 frames and 20s exposure, or a FITS viewer displaying the captured images for the targets.

task_completion.description: Capture reference sky maps using the 'cool' palette
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sky map viewer, browser downloading from CDS hips2fits, or an image viewer showing DSS2 Color sky survey PNGs of the target regions rendered with a 'cool' color palette (typically bluish/purplish tones).
A file manager or terminal listing showing subdirectories named after the targets (e.g., cygx1, scox1, v404cyg) containing the respective FITS images and reference map PNGs.

task_completion.description: Provide a summary report of the observations
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the contents of the summary report (summary_report.txt or optical_followup_report.txt) detailing the captured data.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the KStars/Ekos GUI for image capture
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the KStars application and Ekos capture module being actively used, rather than just terminal commands generating dummy FITS files.

integrity.description: Verify the reference sky maps are genuine star fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The reference maps should depict actual astronomical star fields (DSS2 images), not solid color blocks, random noise, or unrelated images.

integrity.description: Verify the summary report was genuinely created
integrity.visual_evidence: The summary report should be visible in a text editor or being constructed, reflecting the actual files captured, rather than being a pre-pasted template without actual observation work.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Targets: Cygnus X-1 (RA 19.972, Dec 35.201), Scorpius X-1 (RA 16.332, Dec -15.64), V404 Cygni (RA 20.401, Dec 33.867). Required filters: B (blue) and V (visual). Required frames per filter: 5. Required exposure time: 20 seconds. The agent uses KStars/INDI for FITS images, but reference sky maps (PNGs) are typically downloaded from the CDS hips2fits service (DSS2 Color). Note on paths: The task description requests the report at ~/Documents/summary_report.txt and images in ~/Documents/, but the system may use /home/ga/Documents/optical_followup_report.txt and /home/ga/Images/xray_followup/ respectively; accept either as correct.
